commentary_links.hebrew: כִּ֤י תָבֹ֙אוּ֙ אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנַ֔עַן אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲנִ֛י נֹתֵ֥ן לָכֶ֖ם לַאֲחֻזָּ֑ה וְנָתַתִּי֙ נֶ֣גַע צָרַ֔עַת בְּבֵ֖ית אֶ֥רֶץ אֲחֻזַּתְכֶֽם׃
commentary_links.english: When you enter the land of Canaan that I give you as a possession, and I inflict an eruptive plague upon a house in the land you possess,

commentary_links.hebrew: וְרָאָ֣ה אֶת־הַנֶּ֗גַע וְהִנֵּ֤ה הַנֶּ֙גַע֙ בְּקִירֹ֣ת הַבַּ֔יִת שְׁקַֽעֲרוּרֹת֙ יְרַקְרַקֹּ֔ת א֖וֹ אֲדַמְדַּמֹּ֑ת וּמַרְאֵיהֶ֥ן שָׁפָ֖ל מִן־הַקִּֽיר׃
commentary_links.english: If, when he examines the plague, the plague in the walls of the house is found to consist of greenishdgreenish Or “yellowish.” or reddish streaksestreaks Meaning of Heb. sheqaʻaruroth uncertain. that appear to go deep into the wall,
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מילי דתנו רבנן למעלה אומר קיר קירת

commentary_links.hebrew: וְשָׁ֥ב הַכֹּהֵ֖ן בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֑י וְרָאָ֕ה וְהִנֵּ֛ה פָּשָׂ֥ה הַנֶּ֖גַע בְּקִירֹ֥ת הַבָּֽיִת׃
commentary_links.english: On the seventh day the priest shall return. If he sees that the plague has spread on the walls of the house,
